title: <div>7. PPC Advertising Management: Target and optimize your advertising efforts
content:
7. PPC Advertising Management: Target and optimize your advertising efforts with AI-driven analytics for better ROI.
8. Email Marketing: Craft email campaigns that hit the mark every time, driving up engagement and conversions.
9. Analytics & Reporting: Make informed decisions with comprehensive analytics that highlight the success of your marketing strategies.

Subscription Packages:
- Essential Package: Starting at $2,500/month for foundational digital marketing strategies.
- Growth Package: At $5,000/month, designed for businesses aiming to expand their market reach.
- Enterprise Package: For $10,000/month, ideal for large businesses looking to dominate their market segment.
- Ultimate Package: Our premium $15,000/month package for comprehensive, bespoke digital marketing solutions.
- Enterprise Plus Package: Offers unlimited access to all our services, tailored to meet unique business needs. Pricing details available upon request.

We encourage a commitment to either a 6 or 12-month contract to ensure the best results and comprehensive strategy implementation.
context: From document: Cold Call Script & Follow-Up Email — chunk 5 (chunk 5/6)
